chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-287 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 06.10.2025 Syed Akhtar Hussain, advocate for respondents No.2,3 and 4 Mr. Ali Safdar Deepar, AAG ------------- This petition was last taken up on 21.10.2024 which is over one year ago. Learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently in the last one year. Today none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost his interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
